creative_brief: Warm, nostalgic split-frame: left side shows a faded photo of a farmer handing produce over a gate; right side shows a modern FarmThru hub with real farm names on crates. Earthy palette, no text overlay beyond the FarmThru logo.
primary_text:
When did you last know the name of the farmer who raised your beef?

Most of us stopped asking. The supermarket made it easy not to. But something gets lost when food travels thousands of kilometres from farms you will never see.

FarmThru is a farm-direct grocery store. Every product traces to a named NSW farm. No middlemen between them and your family.

Collect from the Brookvale hub, Monday to Friday. No commitment. Days old, not weeks.
headline: When did we stop knowing our farmers?
description: Farm-direct from named NSW farms. Zero middlemen. Collect from Brookvale, no commitment.
